---
title: "Pmetrics Report"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \usepackage{fontspec}
        \setmonofont{Menlo}
        \hypersetup{linktoc=all}
params:
  res_path: NULL
  pkg_path: ""
  report_filename: "report.pdf"
  outeq:
    value: []
  block:
    value: []
  pred_type: "post"
  icen: "median"
  cycle_mode: "neg2ll"
  cycle_gamlam_label: "Gamma"
  cycle_ic_label: "AIC"
  parameter: NULL
  include_summary: true
  include_obs_pred: true
  include_metrics: true
  include_residuals: true
  include_parameters: true
  include_cycle: true
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# When the package is loaded via pkgload::load_all() in the calling session
# (development mode) it is not installed, so library() would fail in this
# fresh Quarto subprocess.  Use load_all() from the source path when provided.
pkg_path <- params$pkg_path
if (!is.null(pkg_path) && nchar(pkg_path) > 0) {
  pkgload::load_all(pkg_path, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  library(PmetricsReports)
}

res <- readRDS(params$res_path)
outeq <- params$outeq
block <- params$block
pred_type <- params$pred_type
icen <- params$icen
cycle_mode <- params$cycle_mode
cycle_gamlam_label <- params$cycle_gamlam_label
cycle_ic_label <- params$cycle_ic_label
parameter <- params$parameter
include_summary <- isTRUE(params$include_summary)
include_obs_pred <- isTRUE(params$include_obs_pred)
include_metrics <- isTRUE(params$include_metrics)
include_residuals <- isTRUE(params$include_residuals)
include_parameters <- isTRUE(params$include_parameters)
include_cycle <- isTRUE(params$include_cycle)
report_filename <- if (!is.null(params$report_filename) && nzchar(params$report_filename)) {
  as.character(params$report_filename)
} else {
  "report.pdf"
}

opts <- Pmetrics::getPMoptions()
date_format <- opts$date_format
if (is.null(date_format) || !nzchar(date_format)) {
  date_format <- "%m/%d/%y"
}

latex_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("\\\\", "\\\\textbackslash{}", x)
  x <- gsub("([#$%&_{}])", "\\\\\\1", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("~", "\\\\textasciitilde{}", x)
  x <- gsub("\\^", "\\\\textasciicircum{}", x)
  x
}

report_filename_latex <- latex_escape(report_filename)

kbl <- function(x, digits = NULL, row.names = FALSE) {
  fmt <- if (knitr::is_latex_output()) "latex" else "pipe"
  x_df <- as.data.frame(x)

  args <- list(
    x = x_df,
    format = fmt,
    booktabs = knitr::is_latex_output(),
    row.names = row.names
  )

  if (!is.null(digits) && length(digits) >= 1) {
    args$digits <- digits
  } else {
    num_idx <- vapply(x_df, is.numeric, logical(1))
    if (any(num_idx)) {
      args$digits <- 3
    }
  }

  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    args$longtable <- nrow(x_df) > 24
  }

  out <- do.call(knitr::kable, args)

  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    out <- paste0(
      "\\begingroup\\ttfamily\\setlength{\\tabcolsep}{4pt}\\renewcommand{\\arraystretch}{0.92}\\small\n",
      out,
      "\n\\endgroup"
    )
  }

  out
}

strip_plot_labels <- function(p) {
  p + ggplot2::labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL, caption = NULL, tag = NULL)
}

plot_asset_counter <- 0L
op_plot_width <- 5
op_plot_height <- 2.5
residual_plot_width <- 5
residual_plot_height <- 2.5
parameter_plot_width <- 5
parameter_plot_height <- 2.5
cycle_plot_width <- 5
cycle_plot_height <- 2.5

emit_plot <- function(p, width, height) {
  plot_asset_counter <<- plot_asset_counter + 1L

  plot_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "plot_assets")
  dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  rel_path <- file.path("plot_assets", sprintf("plot-%03d.pdf", plot_asset_counter))
  abs_path <- file.path(getwd(), rel_path)

  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = abs_path,
    plot = p,
    device = grDevices::pdf,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    units = "in"
  )

  cat("![](", rel_path, "){width=", width, "in height=", height, "in}\n\n", sep = "")
  invisible(NULL)
}
```

```{r}
#| results: asis

cat(
  "\\pagestyle{fancy}\n",
  "\\fancyhf{}\n",
  "\\fancyfoot[C]{\\thepage/\\pageref{LastPage}}\n",
  "\\fancyfoot[R]{\\texttt{", report_filename_latex, "}}\n",
  "\\renewcommand{\\headrulewidth}{0pt}\n",
  "\\renewcommand{\\footrulewidth}{0pt}\n",
  sep = ""
)

if (include_summary) {
  cat("\n\n# Summary\n\n")
  summary_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::summary_table(res)
  summary_nsub <- if (nrow(summary_tbl) && !is.na(summary_tbl$subjects[[1]])) summary_tbl$subjects[[1]] else NA_integer_
  summary_status <- if (nrow(summary_tbl) && !is.na(summary_tbl$model_status[[1]])) {
    as.character(summary_tbl$model_status[[1]])
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
  run_phrase <- if (!is.na(summary_status) && grepl("converg", summary_status, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    "converged"
  } else {
    "reached maximum cycles before convergence"
  }

  cat(
    "\\noindent This report was generated on ",
    format(Sys.time(), date_format),
    " at ",
    format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M"),
    ". The fit contained ",
    if (is.na(summary_nsub)) "NA" else summary_nsub,
    " subjects and the run ",
    run_phrase,
    ".\\par\\medskip\n\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (include_obs_pred) {
  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n# Observed vs. Predicted\n\n")

  all_outeq <- PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res)
  selected_outeq <- if (length(outeq)) intersect(all_outeq, as.integer(outeq)) else all_outeq

  if (!length(selected_outeq)) {
    cat("No output equations available for observed vs predicted plots.\n\n")
  } else {
    op_plot_count <- 0L

    for (oq in selected_outeq) {
      if (op_plot_count > 0L && op_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n## Outeq ", oq, "\n\n", sep = "")

      cat("\n\n### Population Prediction\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "pop",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = FALSE
      )), width = op_plot_width, height = op_plot_height)
      op_plot_count <- op_plot_count + 1L

      if (op_plot_count > 0L && op_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n### Posterior Prediction\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "post",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = FALSE
      )), width = op_plot_width, height = op_plot_height)
      op_plot_count <- op_plot_count + 1L
      cat("\n")
    }
  }
}

if (include_metrics) {
  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n## Prediction Metrics\n\n")
  metrics_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::prediction_metrics_display_table(
    res = res,
    icen = icen,
    pred_type = pred_type,
    outeq = if (length(outeq)) as.integer(outeq) else PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res),
    block = block
  )

  if (nrow(metrics_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(metrics_tbl, digits = 3, row.names = FALSE), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No prediction metrics available for the current selection.\n\n")
  }
}

if (include_residuals) {
  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n## Residual Plots\n\n")
  all_outeq <- PmetricsReports:::available_outeq(res)
  selected_outeq <- if (length(outeq)) intersect(all_outeq, as.integer(outeq)) else all_outeq

  if (!length(selected_outeq)) {
    cat("No output equations available for residual plots.\n\n")
  } else {

    residual_plot_count <- 0L

    for (oq in selected_outeq) {
      if (residual_plot_count > 0L && residual_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n### Outeq ", oq, "\n\n", sep = "")

      cat("\n\n#### Population: Residuals by Time\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "pop",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = TRUE
      )), width = residual_plot_width, height = residual_plot_height)
      residual_plot_count <- residual_plot_count + 1L

      if (residual_plot_count > 0L && residual_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n#### Population: Residuals by Concentration\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_residual_conc_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "pop",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block
      )), width = residual_plot_width, height = residual_plot_height)
      residual_plot_count <- residual_plot_count + 1L

      if (residual_plot_count > 0L && residual_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n#### Posterior: Residuals by Time\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_op_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "post",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block,
        resid = TRUE
      )), width = residual_plot_width, height = residual_plot_height)
      residual_plot_count <- residual_plot_count + 1L

      if (residual_plot_count > 0L && residual_plot_count %% 2L == 0L) {
        cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      }

      cat("\n\n#### Posterior: Residuals by Concentration\n\n")
      emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_residual_conc_plot(
        res = res,
        icen = icen,
        pred_type = "post",
        outeq = oq,
        block = block
      )), width = residual_plot_width, height = residual_plot_height)
      residual_plot_count <- residual_plot_count + 1L
    }
  }
}

if (include_parameters) {
  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n# Parameters\n\n")

  cat("\n\n## Summaries\n\n")
  summary_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::parameter_summary_table(res)
  if (nrow(summary_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(summary_tbl, digits = 3), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No parameter summary data available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Support Points\n\n")
  support_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::support_points_table(res)
  if (nrow(support_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(support_tbl, digits = 3), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No support points available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Covariances\n\n")
  cov_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::covariance_matrix_table(res)
  if (nrow(cov_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cov_tbl, digits = 4), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No covariance matrix available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n## Correlations\n\n")
  cor_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::correlation_matrix_table(res)
  if (nrow(cor_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cor_tbl, digits = 4), "\n\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No correlation matrix available.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n## Marginal Distributions\n\n")
  param_names <- PmetricsReports:::available_parameters(res)
  for (i in seq_along(param_names)) {
    param <- param_names[[i]]
    if (i > 1L && (i - 1L) %% 2L == 0L) {
      cat("\n\\newpage\n")
    }
    cat("\n\n### Parameter: **", param, "**\n\n", sep = "")
    emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_final_plot(res, param)), width = parameter_plot_width, height = parameter_plot_height)
    cat("\n")
  }
}

if (include_cycle) {
  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n# Cycle Info\n\n")

  cycle_plot_defs <- list(
    list(label = "-2*LL", metric = "neg2ll"),
    list(label = cycle_ic_label, metric = tolower(cycle_ic_label)),
    list(label = cycle_gamlam_label, metric = "gamlam"),
    list(label = "Normalized Mean", metric = "norm_mean"),
    list(label = "Normalized Median", metric = "norm_median"),
    list(label = "Normalized SD", metric = "norm_sd")
  )

  for (i in seq_along(cycle_plot_defs)) {
    if (i > 1L && (i - 1L) %% 2L == 0L) {
      cat("\n\\newpage\n")
    }
    cat("\n\n## ", cycle_plot_defs[[i]]$label, "\n\n", sep = "")
    emit_plot(strip_plot_labels(PmetricsReports:::build_cycle_objective_plot(
      res,
      metric = cycle_plot_defs[[i]]$metric,
      gamlam_label = cycle_gamlam_label
    )), width = cycle_plot_width, height = cycle_plot_height)
  }

  cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  cat("\n\n## Cycle Values\n\n")
  cycle_tbl <- PmetricsReports:::cycle_objective_table(res)
  if (nrow(cycle_tbl)) {
    cat(kbl(cycle_tbl, digits = 4), "\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("No cycle objective data available.\n")
  }
}
```
